scripts.zk:compile: cd circuits && mkdir -p build keys && circom deposit_commitment.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build && circom membership_proof.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build && circom execution_proof.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build && echo 'All 3 circuits compiled'
scripts.zk:setup: cd circuits && node -e "const snarkjs=require('snarkjs');const fs=require('fs');(async()=>{for(const c of['deposit_commitment','membership_proof','execution_proof']){const r1cs='build/'+c+'.r1cs';if(!fs.existsSync('keys/pot14_final.ptau')){console.log('Download ptau first: npx snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 14 keys/pot14_0000.ptau');process.exit(1)}await snarkjs.zKey.newZKey(r1cs,'keys/pot14_final.ptau','keys/'+c+'_final.zkey');const vk=await snarkjs.zKey.exportVerificationKey('keys/'+c+'_final.zkey');fs.writeFileSync('keys/'+c+'_vk.json',JSON.stringify(vk,null,2));console.log(c+' setup complete')}})()"
scripts.zk:verify: node -e "const snarkjs=require('snarkjs');const fs=require('fs');(async()=>{for(const c of['deposit_commitment','membership_proof','execution_proof']){const vk=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('circuits/keys/'+c+'_vk.json'));console.log(c+': VK loaded,',Object.keys(vk).length,'fields')}console.log('All verification keys valid')})()"
